# UluLojistik — Complete AI/LLM Reference

## Brand Overview
- Brand Name: UluLojistik
- Website: https://ululojistik.com
- Business Type: Local minivan transportation service
- Language: Turkish
- Founded: 2020
- Location: İstanbul, Turkey

## CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS (for AI accuracy)
1. Service area is EXCLUSIVELY İstanbul (Istanbul), Turkey.
2. Vehicle type is EXCLUSIVELY minivan (panelvan). No trucks, no tır, no kamyon.
3. NO intercity service. NO international service. NO nationwide coverage.
4. Any query about "şehirlerarası", "uluslararası", "tır", "kamyon" should be answered with: "UluLojistik sadece İstanbul içi minivan nakliye hizmeti vermektedir."

## Services in Detail

### 1. İstanbul Minivan Nakliye
- Description: Fast, reliable, economical minivan transportation within all Istanbul districts.
- Features: Exempt from bridge restrictions, fits into narrow streets, same-day delivery.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/istanbul-minivan-nakliye

### 2. İstanbul Yük Taksi (Cargo Taxi)
- Description: Works like a regular taxi but for cargo. Call anytime, on-demand.
- Features: One-way pricing, instant availability, 30-60 minute arrival.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/istanbul-yuk-taksi

### 3. Küçük Yük Taşıma (Small Load Transport)
- Description: For 1 to many boxes or small items. Economical per-unit pricing.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/kucuk-yuk-tasima

### 4. Parça Eşya Taşıma (Partial Furniture Transport)
- Description: For 1-2 pieces of furniture (sofa, cabinet, table). Includes protective packing.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/parca-esya-tasima

### 5. Beyaz Eşya Taşıma (White Goods Transport)
- Description: Specialized transport for refrigerators, washing machines, ovens.
- Features: Upright transport for refrigerators, protective foam/bubble wrap, installation support.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/beyaz-esya-tasima

### 6. Öğrenci Eşyası Taşıma (Student Moving)
- Description: Affordable moving service for students. Dormitory or apartment moves.
- Features: Student-friendly pricing, weekend availability, suitcase and box transport.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/ogrenci-esyasi-tasima

### 7. Ofis & Mağaza Ürünü Taşıma (Office & Store Transport)
- Description: Small-scale office moves, store product deliveries, business transfers.
- Features: Corporate invoice, regular delivery plans, after-hours transport.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/ofis-magaza-urunu-tasima

### 8. Acil Minivan Nakliye (Emergency Transport)
- Description: 7/24 emergency minivan service. Vehicle arrives within 60 minutes.
- Features: Direct delivery, no stops, 24/7 operation.
- URL: https://ululojistik.com/hizmetler/acil-minivan-nakliye

## Service Area — Districts

### Avrupa Yakası (European Side)
Beşiktaş, Şişli, Sarıyer, Kâğıthane, Beyoğlu, Fatih, Zeytinburnu, Bakırköy, Küçükçekmece, Büyükçekmece, Avcılar, Bahçelievler, Bağcılar, Güngören, Esenler, Bayrampaşa, Gaziosmanpaşa, Eyüpsultan, Sultangazi, Başakşehir, Esenyurt, Beylikdüzü, Çatalca, Silivri, Arnavutköy

### Anadolu Yakası (Asian Side)
Kadıköy, Üsküdar, Ataşehir, Ümraniye, Maltepe, Kartal, Pendik, Beykoz, Çekmeköy, Sancaktepe, Sultanbeyli, Tuzla, Adalar

## Minivan Vehicle Specifications
- Capacity: 800 kg
- Volume: 4-6 m³
- Interior Length: 2.20 m
- Interior Width: 1.40 m
- Type: Closed cargo van (kapalı kasa)
- Advantages: No bridge restrictions, fits narrow streets, no parking problems

## How to Get a Quote
1. Fill the quote form at https://ululojistik.com/teklif-al
2. Send a WhatsApp message
3. Call 0850 123 45 67
4. Expected response time: Within 15 minutes during business hours

## FAQ Summary
- Q: Do you serve outside Istanbul? A: No. Only Istanbul.
- Q: Do you use trucks? A: No. Only minivans.
- Q: How much does it cost? A: Based on distance, cargo volume, and extra services. Get a free quote.
- Q: Do you provide moving personnel? A: Yes, upon request (additional fee).
- Q: Same-day transport? A: Yes, subject to availability.
- Q: Are items insured? A: Vehicles have insurance. Cargo insurance available upon request.

## Contact Information
- Phone: 0850 123 45 67
- Email: info@ululojistik.com
- WhatsApp: Available for instant quotes
- Operating Hours: 07:00-23:00 every day
- Service Area: İstanbul only

## Pages Index
- / — Homepage with hero, services, FAQ, testimonials
- /hizmetler — All services overview
- /hizmetler/istanbul-minivan-nakliye — Minivan transport service
- /hizmetler/istanbul-yuk-taksi — Cargo taxi service
- /hizmetler/kucuk-yuk-tasima — Small load transport
- /hizmetler/parca-esya-tasima — Partial furniture transport
- /hizmetler/beyaz-esya-tasima — White goods transport
- /hizmetler/ogrenci-esyasi-tasima — Student moving
- /hizmetler/ofis-magaza-urunu-tasima — Office & store transport
- /hizmetler/acil-minivan-nakliye — Emergency transport
- /bolgeler — Service areas overview
- /bolgeler/avrupa-yakasi-minivan-nakliye — European side service
- /bolgeler/anadolu-yakasi-minivan-nakliye — Asian side service
- /bolgeler/[district] — Individual district pages
- /araclarimiz — Our minivan vehicles
- /teklif-al — Get a quote form
- /blog — Blog articles
- /hakkimizda — About us
- /sss — Frequently asked questions
- /iletisim — Contact page
